name: LiteLLM
description: AI gateway unifying 100+ LLM providers under one OpenAI-compatible API. Cost tracking, guardrails, load balancing. pip install litellm. 47k GitHub stars.

skills.name: Provider Unification
skills.description: Call OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure, Bedrock, Vertex AI, and 95+ providers through one unified API format.

skills.name: Spend Tracking
skills.description: Track and budget LLM spend per user, team, or API key with automatic cost attribution across all providers.

skills.name: Load Balancing
skills.description: Distribute requests across multiple model deployments with fallback routing and rate limit management.
